headline: CRAI Stock Barely Moves Since Q1 Earnings Miss & Revenue Beat
summary: Charles River shares remained flat after Q1 results, as an earnings miss and weak 2026 revenue outlook offset revenue growth.

headline: Equifax : March 2026 U.S. National Consumer Credit Trends Report
summary: As of March 2026, the monthly Equifax Consumer Credit Trends Report showed that total U.S. consumer debt was $18.19 trillion, up 2.8% from March 2025. Mortgage debt, including home equity loans,...
